plugins.name: nerdo-essentials
plugins.description: Custom statusline with jj/language detection, setup command, and specialized agents (researcher, root-cause-analyzer, ui-tester)

plugins.name: nerdo-mcp-bundle
plugins.description: Collection of MCP servers: context7, clear-thought, json-emitter, precision-math, excel, and Playwright (headless + headed)

plugins.name: jj-snapshot
plugins.description: Runs `jj status` after every tool execution so jj snapshots the working copy granularly as the agent works; each snapshot is its own restorable operation in jj op log. omp plugin (tool_result hook).
